content.text:
[cron:3a9ddbae-0caf-4fef-a7ba-601535f51461 Smart Compaction — All Sisters] Run smart compaction for all sisters. Execute: cd ~/.openclaw/workspace/tools && .venv/bin/python3 smart_compaction.py --agent all. If any sister is over 50% threshold, the script will dump memories to Postgres and trim files automatically. Report what happened briefly. Reply NO_REPLY if nothing needed attention.
Current time: Wednesday, March 11th, 2026 — 12:01 PM (America/New_York)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

content.thinking: Running the smart compaction script for all sisters as requested by the cron job.

content.text:
**Smart Compaction — March 11, 12:01 PM**

All five sisters processed. Here's what happened:

- **Main** — Trimmed 1 oversized transcript (2.8MB → 2.0MB). 123 sessions, running hot at 489% context but stable.
- **Recovery** — Dumped 10 memories from `2026-03-10.md` to Postgres. 686% context usage — heaviest relative to her window.
- **Scholar** — Clean. No action needed (237%).
- **Forge** — Clean. No action needed (305%).
- **Memory** — Clean. No action needed (216%).

All compactions completed successfully. Recovery got the most attention — her March 10 daily notes are now safely in Postgres.
